mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item(order_id, sku_id, product_name, spec_name, price_fen, quantity, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{skuId}, #{productName}, #{specName}, #{priceFen}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id
